StepAction: Build AccountManager service (account/manager.ts) with API signature and wrap Auth+Account
Condition: AccountManager module created with all method signatures

StepAction: Integrate typed event bus: define account events and emit from each mutation method
Condition: All mutation methods emit typed events via packages/bus

StepAction: Implement write-ahead storage pattern (temp → rename → update memory) and provider capability declaration
Condition: save() uses write-ahead; provider hardcode replaced with capability lookups

StepAction: Setup event consumers: TUI subscriber, Web SSE channel, Console SSE listener
Condition: Consumers receive account events and update state; end-to-end verified

StepAction: Route Service Delegation (Slice A): delegate all mutation routes to AccountManager, add mismatch guard (400), remove daemon fallback
Condition: All mutation routes delegate to AccountManager; no direct Account/Auth calls in routes; mismatch returns 400

SubGrafcet.StepAction: Rewrite list/setActive/rename routes to delegate to AccountManager
Rewrite remove/connect/login/quota routes and add mismatch guard
Condition: All routes delegated; mismatch guard active

SubGrafcet.StepAction: Remove UserDaemonManager fallback path (daemon fail → 503, no fallback)
Condition: No fallback path exists in route layer

StepAction: Silent Fallback Elimination (Slice B): Auth.set disclosure, mutation target validation, explicit migration logging
Condition: Auth.set returns action disclosure; missing targets return 404; migrations log explicitly

StepAction: CLI/TUI Mutation Convergence (Slice C): replace all direct Account/Auth mutations with AccountManager calls
Condition: No direct Account.setActive/remove/update or Auth.set/remove in CLI/TUI; mutations emit events

StepAction: Authority Unification (Slice D): implement session-local ephemeral selection, separate UI badges, handle account deletion fallback
Condition: Session-local selection is ephemeral; global active unchanged by model-manager selection; UI badges differentiated

StepAction: Surface Alignment (Slice E): unify app/console form semantics, route model-manager actions through AccountManager, replace console reload with SSE
Condition: Form fields canonical; model-manager actions go through service; console uses SSE sync

StepAction: Deploy Gate + Legacy Cleanup (Slice F): automate SHA256 gate in webctl.sh, eliminate parseProvider/parseFamily entirely, remove all family type exports/helpers, rename canonical-family-source → canonical-provider-source, migrate storage key
Condition: All family code eliminated, no residual FamilyData/FAMILIES/resolveFamily/parseFamily

StepAction: Finalize: update architecture.md, event logs, run regression (ghost responses), complete cross-cutting tasks
Condition: All slices validated; architecture synced; no ghost responses regression

StepAction: Verify UX invariance: TUI admin panel and webapp model manager operation flow unchanged after refactor
Condition: UX regression test passed: TUI admin panel + webapp model manager flows verified identical
